mapper.select: SELECT m.promotion_id, b.title, b.benefits, b.image_url, m.fk_hotel_id, m.discount_rate, m.price, TO_CHAR(m.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(m.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date FROM PROMOTION_MASTER m INNER JOIN PROMOTION_BANNER b ON m.promotion_id = b.fk_promotion_id WHERE m.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND m.is_active = 1 AND b.active_yn = 'Y' AND b.banner_type = 'CARD' -- 리스트에는 슬라이드용이 아닌 카드용만 노출 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN m.start_date AND m.end_date ORDER BY m.start_date DESC

SELECT m.promotion_id, m.fk_hotel_id, m.price, m.discount_rate, b.title, b.subtitle, b.benefits, /* 상세 설명 및 혜택으로 활용 */ b.image_url, TO_CHAR(m.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(m.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date FROM PROMOTION_MASTER m INNER JOIN PROMOTION_BANNER b ON m.promotion_id = b.fk_promotion_id WHERE m.promotion_id = #{promotionId} AND ROWNUM = 1
